query:
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.projectId,
  p.amount,
  p.type,
  p.movementType,
  p.receivedAt,
  'PAGO SIN PROYECTO' as alerta
FROM payments p
WHERE p.projectId IS NULL
ORDER BY p.receivedAt DESC
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.projectId,
  p.amount,
  p.type,
  p.movementType,
  p.receivedAt,
  'PAGO SIN PROYECTO' as alerta
FROM payments p
WHERE p.projectId IS NULL
ORDER BY p.receivedAt DESC
